changedFiles.reason: Bound the root-cause correction to release identity, preflight, freeze generation, and publication stop boundaries.
Records evidence and prevents claiming publication or Quick Install completion.
Added an early canonical projection lineage gate before archive generation.
Added regression coverage for mixed candidate lineage and published/candidate projection drift.
Reserved the one immutable archive record in this functional Work Item with explicit repayment.
Generated no-active cockpit status after archival.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Fail closed before expensive CI when release identity evidence is incomplete or inconsistent.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: Contract requires shared preflight validation and focused regression coverage.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Keep template release metadata and lifecycle evidence explicit; do not infer publication from a moving ref.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: Implementation will require concrete commit identities and preserve publication as a separate operation.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Do not rewrite historical archived Work Item evidence.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: This Work Item only adds new active/archived lifecycle evidence and does not edit historical archive records.

risk.detail: Release identity is a high-integrity boundary; this Work Item stops before tag/publication and requires complete PR closure.

residualRisks.detail: The public repository remains at v0.5.38 and v0.5.39 is not published; publication is intentionally deferred until a later authorized Work Item.

reviewReadiness.reason: All required verification passed; residual risk remains documented.
expectedReviewFocus: Single canonical release identity across state, projections, freeze, and digests.
Fail-closed ordering before expensive release checks.
No publication or Quick Install side effects.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Mixed release identity evidence is rejected before archive generation.
Canonical candidate lineage is accepted when published/candidate projections agree.
Publication and Quick Install remain out of scope for this process correction.
evidence: No tag or release workflow command executed

knownGaps: The actual release candidate and provider assets are intentionally not produced by this Work Item.

observedIssues.issue: Preflight initially rejected the Work Item because the projected archive budget was 518 while policy max was 517.
observedIssues.rootCause: Budget reservation was not added before the first preflight attempt.
observedIssues.correction: Raised the policy ceiling within this functional Work Item and recorded a user-approved repayment record; no budget-only Work Item was created.

observedIssues.issue: Release projections could be loaded independently without an earliest shared lineage check.
observedIssues.rootCause: Canonical state/projection checks were not part of release preflight ordering.
observedIssues.correction: Added validate_release_projection and focused tests before deterministic archive generation.

observedIssues.issue: Full quality measured pythonLines=40240, exceeding the initially reserved 40200 ceiling.
observedIssues.rootCause: The early projection gate and regression coverage added more executable governance code than the initial bounded estimate.
observedIssues.correction: Reserved 40200→40300 in this functional Work Item and policy repayment records; no budget-only Work Item was created.

observedIssues.issue: The first complete Finish run reached agent-risk without a before_edit checkpoint entry.
observedIssues.rootCause: The checkpoint was recorded before_finish only; the lifecycle evidence requirement was not checked before the first Finish attempt.
observedIssues.correction: Recorded the before_edit checkpoint in the current Work Item and retained the failed-then-corrected evidence rather than claiming it existed earlier.

overclaimPrevention: Do not report completion for checks or behavior that were not verified.
